mapper.sql: select o.order_id, o.order_no, o.hospital_id, o.supplier_id, o.spd_supplier_id, o.order_supplier_name, o.warehouse_id, o.order_amount, o.warehouse_name, o.order_date, o.order_status, o.order_dept_id, o.order_dept_name, o.apply_dept, o.tenant_id, o.remark, o.create_by, o.create_time, o.update_by, o.update_time, h.hospital_name, COALESCE(nullif(trim(o.order_supplier_name),''), s.company_name) as supplier_name, COALESCE(nullif(trim(o.order_dept_name),''), o.apply_dept) as dept_display from scm_order o left join scm_hospital h on o.hospital_id = h.hospital_id left join scm_supplier s on o.supplier_id = s.supplier_id
EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM scm_delivery d WHERE d.order_id = o.order_id AND (d.del_flag IS NULL OR d.del_flag = '' OR d.del_flag = '0') )

choose.when: AND o.order_status != '4' AND ( EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM scm_order_detail od WHERE od.order_id = o.order_id AND IFNULL(od.order_quantity, 0) > 0 AND IFNULL(od.remaining_quantity, 0) > 0 AND IFNULL(od.remaining_quantity, 0) < IFNULL(od.order_quantity, 0) ) OR ( EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM scm_order_detail od1 WHERE od1.order_id = o.order_id AND IFNULL(od1.order_quantity, 0) > 0 AND IFNULL(od1.remaining_quantity, 0) = 0 ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM scm_order_detail od2 WHERE od2.order_id = o.order_id AND IFNULL(od2.order_quantity, 0) > 0 AND IFNULL(od2.remaining_quantity, 0) > 0 ) ) )

AND o.order_status != '4' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM scm_order_detail od WHERE od.order_id = o.order_id AND IFNULL(od.order_quantity, 0) > 0 AND IFNULL(od.remaining_quantity, 0) > 0 ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM scm_order_detail od2 WHERE od2.order_id = o.order_id AND IFNULL(od2.order_quantity, 0) > 0 )

AND o.order_status != '4' AND o.order_status != '0' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM scm_order_detail od WHERE od.order_id = o.order_id AND IFNULL(od.order_quantity, 0) > 0 AND IFNULL(od.remaining_quantity, 0) < IFNULL(od.order_quantity, 0) )
choose.otherwise: AND o.order_status != '4' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM scm_order_detail od WHERE od.order_id = o.order_id AND IFNULL(od.order_quantity, 0) > 0 AND IFNULL(od.remaining_quantity, 0) < IFNULL(od.order_quantity, 0) )

mapper.select:
AND o.order_no like concat('%', #{orderNo}, '%')
AND o.hospital_id = #{hospitalId}
AND h.hospital_name like concat('%', #{hospitalName}, '%')
AND o.supplier_id = #{supplierId}
AND s.company_name like concat('%', #{supplierName}, '%')
AND o.order_status = #{orderStatus}
AND o.order_status != '4'
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM scm_order_detail od WHERE od.order_id = o.order_id AND IFNULL(od.order_quantity, 0) > 0 AND IFNULL(od.remaining_quantity, 0) < IFNULL(od.order_quantity, 0) )
AND ( EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM scm_order_detail od WHERE od.order_id = o.order_id AND IFNULL(od.order_quantity, 0) > 0 AND IFNULL(od.remaining_quantity, 0) > 0 AND IFNULL(od.remaining_quantity, 0) < IFNULL(od.order_quantity, 0) ) OR ( EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM scm_order_detail od1 WHERE od1.order_id = o.order_id AND IFNULL(od1.order_quantity, 0) > 0 AND IFNULL(od1.remaining_quantity, 0) = 0 ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM scm_order_detail od2 WHERE od2.order_id = o.order_id AND IFNULL(od2.order_quantity, 0) > 0 AND IFNULL(od2.remaining_quantity, 0) > 0 ) ) )
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM scm_order_detail od WHERE od.order_id = o.order_id AND IFNULL(od.order_quantity, 0) > 0 AND IFNULL(od.remaining_quantity, 0) > 0 ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM scm_order_detail od2 WHERE od2.order_id = o.order_id AND IFNULL(od2.order_quantity, 0) > 0 )
AND date(o.order_date) = date(#{orderDate})
AND date(o.order_date) >= date(#{params.beginTime})
AND date(o.order_date) <= date(#{params.endTime})
AND o.hospital_id NOT IN
#{hid}
AND o.supplier_id IN
#{sid}
AND 1 = 0
AND (
(o.hospital_id = #{sp.hospitalId} AND o.supplier_id = #{sp.supplierId})
)
order by o.order_date desc, o.create_time desc
mapper.insert:
insert into scm_order( order_no, hospital_id, supplier_id, spd_supplier_id, order_supplier_name, warehouse_id, order_amount, warehouse_name, order_date, order_status, order_dept_id, order_dept_name, apply_dept, tenant_id, remark, create_by, create_time )values( #{orderNo}, #{hospitalId}, #{supplierId}, #{spdSupplierId}, #{orderSupplierName}, #{warehouseId}, #{orderAmount}, #{warehouse}, #{orderDate}, #{orderStatus}, #{orderDeptId},
#{orderDeptName}, #{department},
#{department}, #{tenantId}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.delete:
delete from scm_order where order_id in
#{orderId}
